title: HTTP Semantics, Roles, Representations, and Layered Evidence · Go Client Systems · Failure Repair Bay
summary: An on-call reliability engineer tracing a production client incident must isolate a plausible but incorrect result from conflicting traces, repair its cause, and retain a regression witness for http semantics, roles, representations, and layered evidence, producing protocol evidence map. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a Go 1.26 net/http protocol evidence map and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theor…
objectives: Distinguish client, server, user agent, origin, intermediary, gateway, proxy, and cache roles per exchange. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Separate a resource from the selected representation and its metadata, content, and current validity. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Trace request construction, routing, transport, intermediary handling, response interpretation, and cleanup as distinct stages. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Client Server Roles
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug Go incident collection agent request G-6 crosses a resolver, TLS connection, gateway, cache, and origin before a changed payload is rejected. Separate every role, representation, state holder, and failure layer before editing code. Competency probe: Distinguish client, server, user agent, origin, intermediary, gateway, proxy, and cache roles per exchange. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Inspect the Client Server Roles trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
